# PassKite

> Generate Apple Wallet passes (.pkpass) and add them to iOS Wallet or Google Wallet with Expo and React Native

PassKite is an Expo/React Native library for generating Apple Wallet passes and adding them to device wallets.

## Documentation

- Full docs: https://seventwo-studio.github.io/passkite/
- API Reference: https://seventwo-studio.github.io/passkite/reference/api/
- Types Reference: https://seventwo-studio.github.io/passkite/reference/types/
- LLM-optimized full docs: https://seventwo-studio.github.io/passkite/llms-full.txt

## Quick Start

```bash
npx expo install expo-passkite
```

```typescript
import { createPassBuilder, createPass, PassType, addPassToWallet } from 'expo-passkite';

const builder = createPassBuilder()
  .setIdentifiers({
    passTypeIdentifier: 'pass.com.example.app',
    serialNumber: 'CARD-001',
    teamIdentifier: 'TEAM_ID',
  })
  .setOrganization({
    organizationName: 'Company',
    description: 'Loyalty Card',
  })
  .setPassType(PassType.StoreCard)
  .addPrimaryField({ key: 'points', label: 'POINTS', value: '500' });

const { passData, images } = builder.build();
const pass = createPass(passData, images);
pass.setSigningCredentials({ signerCertificate, signerKey });
const base64 = await pass.generateBase64();
await addPassToWallet(base64);
```

## Key Features

- Pass Generation: Create valid .pkpass files with fluent builder API
- All Pass Types: BoardingPass, Coupon, EventTicket, StoreCard, Generic
- Wallet Integration: Add passes to iOS Wallet with native module
- Expo Config Plugin: Automatic iOS entitlements setup
- Embedded WWDR: Apple certificate included, no extra setup

## Main Exports

### Pass Creation
- `createPassBuilder()` - Create pass data builder
- `createPass(passData, images)` - Create pass instance
- `pass.setSigningCredentials({...})` - Set signing certs
- `pass.generate()` - Generate as Buffer
- `pass.generateBase64()` - Generate as base64

### Wallet
- `addPassToWallet(base64)` - Add to device wallet
- `canAddPasses()` - Check if can add passes
- `isPassLibraryAvailable()` - Check wallet availability
- `containsPass(typeId, serial)` - Check if pass exists

### Events
- `onPassAdded(callback)` - Subscribe to add events
- `onPassRemoved(callback)` - Subscribe to remove events

### Enums
- `PassType`: BoardingPass, Coupon, EventTicket, StoreCard, Generic
- `BarcodeFormat`: QR, PDF417, Aztec, Code128
- `PassImageType`: Icon, Logo, Strip, Background, Thumbnail, Footer
- `TransitType`: Air, Boat, Bus, Train, Generic

## Requirements

- Expo SDK 52+ or React Native 0.76+
- Apple Developer Program membership
- Pass Type ID certificate
- iOS 15+ for wallet features

## Repository

https://github.com/seventwo-studio/passkite
